projectDescription: A Unity Editor tool that optimizes VRChat Avatar 3.0 by merging skinned meshes, materials, and shader properties to reduce draw calls and improve performance.
keyFeatures: Merges skinned meshes to reduce draw calls and bone count
Merges materials with the same or different properties using shader injection
Shader Toggles: embeds mesh visibility logic into shaders to merge independently animated meshes
NaNimation Toggles: uses NaN bone scale to toggle merged meshes without shader changes
Optimizes FX Layer by merging simple toggle layers into direct blend trees
Removes unused components, blend shapes, bones, and game objects
Writes material properties as static values for GPU constant folding
Merges textures of the same dimensions into Texture2DArrays
Non-destructive: applies optimizations on upload or to a separate optimized copy
Preview mode shows mesh/material merge results and FX layer optimization results before applying
publicApiSurface: d4rkAvatarOptimizer component (MonoBehaviour, placed on avatar root or any ancestor)
Tools/d4rkpl4y3r/Why No Material Merge editor window
